item.title: AMI Labs CEO Rejects 'AGI' Label Despite $1.03 Billion Seed Round
item.summary: AMI Labs CEO Alexandre LeBrun has publicly refused to describe his company's AI as 'AGI' or 'superintelligence,' arguing the terms are ill-defined, even as the startup operates on a reported $1.03 billion seed round at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation to build physical-world AI models.
